DATA_C_AC_HH_RELIABLE_TEAMWORKER_DESCRIP: Reliable Teamworker archetype based on A-C axis combination.
DATA_C_AC_HL_KIND_DREAMER_DESCRIPTION: Kind Dreamer archetype based on A-C axis combination.
DATA_C_AC_LH_STRICT_COMMANDER_DESCRIPTIO: Strict Commander archetype based on A-C axis combination.
DATA_C_AC_LL_UNRULY_BRUTE_DESCRIPTION: Unruly Brute archetype based on A-C axis combination.
DATA_C_ADVENTURER_DESCRIPTION: Seeks new lands and knowledge proactively; triggers exploration and settlement events.
DATA_C_AGITATOR_DESCRIPTION: Moves crowds to amplify conflict or accelerate change; may trigger revolution or riot events.
DATA_C_ANIMAL_TAMER_DESCRIPTION: Strong with animals; benefits civilizations that leverage animals for transport, combat, or production.
DATA_C_AO_HH_OPEN_MINDED_HUMANITARIAN_DE: Open‑Minded Humanitarian archetype based on A-O axis combination.
DATA_C_AO_HL_BENEVOLENT_TRADITIONALIST_D: Benevolent Traditionalist archetype based on A-O axis combination.
DATA_C_AO_LH_CYNICAL_HERETIC_DESCRIPTION: Cynical Heretic archetype based on A-O axis combination.
DATA_C_AO_LL_RIGID_OPPRESSOR_DESCRIPTION: Rigid Oppressor archetype based on A-O axis combination.
DATA_C_ARCHITECT_MASTER_DESCRIPTION: Builds with both structure and aesthetics; can improve defense, productivity, and beauty satisfaction.
DATA_C_ARTIST_DESCRIPTION: Strong emotion and expression drive; boosts cultural and social events but may be fragile in crises.
DATA_C_ASCETIC_DESCRIPTION: Values discipline and restraint, avoiding indulgence; strong in resource management and survival through crises.
DATA_C_ASSASSIN_INSTINCT_DESCRIPTION: Prefers covert elimination over open confrontation; promotes political assassination and sabotage events.
DATA_C_ASSAULT_CAPTAIN_DESCRIPTION: Enjoys leading charges and pushing the unit forward; big morale gain on victory, big losses on defeat.
DATA_C_BACKROOM_BROKER_DESCRIPTION: Profits from illicit trade and brokering; becomes dramatic in systems with contraband, sanctions, or policing.
DATA_C_BERSERKER_DESCRIPTION: Very low fear with extremely high aggression; charges and pursues often but is hard to control and may suffer heavy losses.
DATA_C_BORN_LEADER_DESCRIPTION: Gathers and organizes people while staying calm under pressure; strongly prefers leadership roles.
DATA_C_BORN_MERCHANT_DESCRIPTION: Expands trade through negotiation and relationship-building; can create long-term trust networks if fair.
DATA_C_BUILDER_FOREMAN_DESCRIPTION: Assigns people and manages workflow; shortens completion time for large construction projects.
DATA_C_CAREGIVER_DESCRIPTION: Naturally drawn to nurturing and healing; strong benefits for population stability and family-centered societies.
DATA_C_CHEF_DESCRIPTION: Improves food quality and satisfaction; strong in morale recovery, bonding, and festival events.
DATA_C_COLD_DICTATOR_DESCRIPTION: Cold and aggressive even under pressure; strong in wartime leadership but worsens peacetime conflict.
DATA_C_COLLECTOR_DESCRIPTION: Collects and organizes valuable items; can support culture, museums, and research stockpiles.
DATA_C_COUNSELOR_DESCRIPTION: Reads emotions and counsels others; reduces mental breaks and speeds up relationship repair.
DATA_C_CO_HH_METHODICAL_INVENTOR_DESCRIP: Methodical Inventor archetype based on C-O axis combination.
DATA_C_CO_HL_CONSERVATIVE_MANAGER_DESCRI: Conservative Manager archetype based on C-O axis combination.
DATA_C_CO_LH_FREE_SPIRIT_DESCRIPTION: Free Spirit archetype based on C-O axis combination.
DATA_C_CO_LL_CARELESS_WASTER_DESCRIPTION: Careless Waster archetype based on C-O axis combination.
DATA_C_DEFENDER_DESCRIPTION: Strong at defense, cover, and retreat timing rather than reckless charges; reduces losses and improves long fights.
DATA_C_DEMOCRATIC_LEADER_DESCRIPTION: Leads through trust and consensus; increases cooperation events and reduces revolt risk.
DATA_C_DIPLOMAT_DESCRIPTION: Resolves disputes through negotiation and forms alliances; supports war avoidance, trade expansion, and federation building.
DATA_C_EA_HH_COMPASSIONATE_RECONCILER_DE: Compassionate Reconciler archetype based on E-A axis combination.
DATA_C_EA_HL_TIMID_HELPER_DESCRIPTION: Timid Helper archetype based on E-A axis combination.
DATA_C_EA_LH_VOLATILE_BULLY_DESCRIPTION: Volatile Bully archetype based on E-A axis combination.
DATA_C_EA_LL_CALLOUS_ABUSER_DESCRIPTION: Callous Abuser archetype based on E-A axis combination.
DATA_C_EC_HH_ANXIOUS_PLANNER_DESCRIPTION: Anxious Planner archetype based on E-C axis combination.
DATA_C_EC_HL_ANXIOUS_DRIFTER_DESCRIPTION: Anxious Drifter archetype based on E-C axis combination.
DATA_C_EC_LH_COOL_STRATEGIST_DESCRIPTION: Cool Strategist archetype based on E-C axis combination.
DATA_C_EC_LL_RECKLESS_DRIFTER_DESCRIPTIO: Reckless Drifter archetype based on E-C axis combination.
DATA_C_ENCYCLOPEDIA_DESCRIPTION: Accumulates and transfers broad knowledge, increasing education and technology diffusion speed.
DATA_C_ENGINEER_DESCRIPTION: Enjoys design and problem-solving; becomes core staff for maintenance, invention, and improvement.
DATA_C_EO_HH_SENSITIVE_ARTIST_DESCRIPTIO: Sensitive Artist archetype based on E-O axis combination.
DATA_C_EO_HL_ANXIOUS_TRADITIONALIST_DESC: Anxious Traditionalist archetype based on E-O axis combination.
DATA_C_EO_LH_COLD_EXPERIMENTER_DESCRIPTI: Cold Experimenter archetype based on E-O axis combination.
DATA_C_EO_LL_UNFEELING_REALIST_DESCRIPTI: Unfeeling Realist archetype based on E-O axis combination.
DATA_C_EX_HH_EMOTIONAL_SOCIALITE_DESCRIP: Emotional Socialite archetype based on E-X axis combination.
DATA_C_EX_HL_TIMID_RECLUSE_DESCRIPTION: Timid Recluse archetype based on E-X axis combination.
DATA_C_EX_LH_DAREDEVIL_DESCRIPTION: Daredevil archetype based on E-X axis combination.
DATA_C_EX_LL_STOIC_LONER_DESCRIPTION: Stoic Loner archetype based on E-X axis combination.
DATA_C_FREE_SPIRIT_EXTRO_DESCRIPTION: Values experience over rules and moves impulsively; increases creative events but also operational mistakes.
DATA_C_GOSSIP_DESCRIPTION: Spreads information quickly; energizes social networks but can also accelerate distrust and factionalism.
DATA_C_HA_HH_KIND_HEARTED_HONEST_DESCRIP: Kind‑Hearted Honest archetype based on H-A axis combination.
DATA_C_HA_HL_STERN_JUDGE_DESCRIPTION: Stern Judge archetype based on H-A axis combination.
DATA_C_HA_LH_SMILING_EXPLOITER_DESCRIPTI: Smiling Exploiter archetype based on H-A axis combination.
DATA_C_HA_LL_CRUEL_RAIDER_DESCRIPTION: Cruel Raider archetype based on H-A axis combination.
DATA_C_HC_HH_HONEST_ADMINISTRATOR_DESCRI: Honest Administrator archetype based on H-C axis combination.
DATA_C_HC_HL_WELL_MEANING_SLACKER_DESCRI: Well‑Meaning Slacker archetype based on H-C axis combination.
DATA_C_HC_LH_CALCULATING_SCHEMER_DESCRIP: Calculating Schemer archetype based on H-C axis combination.
DATA_C_HC_LL_IRRESPONSIBLE_CHEAT_DESCRIP: Irresponsible Cheat archetype based on H-C axis combination.
DATA_C_HEALER_DESCRIPTION: Increases healing and care actions; strongly improves recovery after plagues and wars.
DATA_C_HERETIC_DESCRIPTION: Challenges established doctrine and institutions; accelerates innovation but may trigger persecution and conflict.
DATA_C_HERMIT_SAGE_DESCRIPTION: Avoids crowds but dives deep into scholarship and technology, accelerating research progression.
DATA_C_HE_HH_TENDER_CONSCIENCE_DESCRIPTI: Tender Conscience archetype based on H-E axis combination.
DATA_C_HE_HL_STOIC_HONEST_DESCRIPTION: Stoic Honest archetype based on H-E axis combination.
DATA_C_HE_LH_ANXIOUS_SWINDLER_DESCRIPTIO: Anxious Swindler archetype based on H-E axis combination.
DATA_C_HE_LL_COLD_EXPLOITER_DESCRIPTION: Cold Exploiter archetype based on H-E axis combination.
DATA_C_HO_HH_IDEALISTIC_INNOVATOR_DESCRI: Idealistic Innovator archetype based on H-O axis combination.
DATA_C_HO_HL_TRADITIONAL_MORALIST_DESCRI: Traditional Moralist archetype based on H-O axis combination.
DATA_C_HO_LH_CUNNING_INVENTOR_DESCRIPTIO: Cunning Inventor archetype based on H-O axis combination.
DATA_C_HO_LL_CORRUPT_TRADITIONALIST_DESC: Corrupt Traditionalist archetype based on H-O axis combination.
DATA_C_HX_HH_HONEST_LEADER_DESCRIPTION: Honest Leader archetype based on H-X axis combination.
DATA_C_HX_HL_HONEST_RECLUSE_DESCRIPTION: Honest Recluse archetype based on H-X axis combination.
DATA_C_HX_LH_CHARISMATIC_CON_ARTIST_DESC: Charismatic Con Artist archetype based on H-X axis combination.
DATA_C_HX_LL_SLY_LONER_DESCRIPTION: Sly Loner archetype based on H-X axis combination.
DATA_C_INVENTOR_DESCRIPTION: Creates new tools and methods; acts as a catalyst for technological era transitions.
DATA_C_LABOR_HERO_DESCRIPTION: Drives production upward; however, burnout risk is high and rest events become important.
DATA_C_MASTER_CRAFTSMAN_DESCRIPTION: A reclusive expert focused on high-quality crafting; greatly increases quality while reducing social activity.
DATA_C_MEDIATOR_KING_DESCRIPTION: Uses authority to mediate conflict and govern fairly; very strong for domestic stability and alliance maintenance.
DATA_C_MERCENARY_DESCRIPTION: Fights for pay and status; becomes a strong narrative driver in systems with contracts, wages, and loot.
DATA_C_MISER_DESCRIPTION: Overly conserves resources and avoids communal investment; may miss long-term growth opportunities.
DATA_C_MYSTIC_DESCRIPTION: Values symbols and ritual over rational proof; strong influence in systems with religion or magic/ritual.
DATA_C_NOMAD_DESCRIPTION: Prefers movement over settling; strong for early exploration and route discovery but weak at stable production.
DATA_C_PACIFIST_DESCRIPTION: Strongly avoids violence, favoring negotiation and support; suffers high stress during warfare.
DATA_C_PEACEKEEPER_DESCRIPTION: Tries to enforce rules fairly; strong at crime suppression and dispute mediation.
DATA_C_PHILANTHROPIST_DESCRIPTION: Uses resources for the common good; strongly increases charity and relief actions during crises.
DATA_C_POLYMATH_DESCRIPTION: High learning speed and adaptability; boosts research, crafting, and leadership across domains.
DATA_C_PRAGMATIST_DESCRIPTION: Values results over ideology; makes quick decisions in crises but may slow radical innovation.
DATA_C_RECONCILER_DESCRIPTION: Mediates conflicts and repairs relationships quickly, greatly reducing intra-group disputes.
DATA_C_REVOLUTIONARY_DESCRIPTION: Preaches change and disrupts the status quo; can boost innovation while raising conflict.
DATA_C_SAINTESS_DESCRIPTION: High empathy and moral concern; strongly increases caretaking, healing, and charitable behavior.
DATA_C_SAINT_DESCRIPTION: High honesty, agreeableness, and conscientiousness. Greatly increases trust and stability in a community.
DATA_C_SCHOLAR_SCRIBE_DESCRIPTION: Accumulates knowledge and records; becomes key staff in writing, administration, and science stages.
DATA_C_SCIENTIST_DESCRIPTION: Research-driven and detail-oriented; accelerates technological advancement.
DATA_C_SCOUT_DESCRIPTION: Continues exploring while managing danger; strong in map-making, resource discovery, and first-contact events.
DATA_C_SETTLER_DESCRIPTION: Prefers settlement and infrastructure; greatly increases stability and production in agriculture/urbanization stages.
DATA_C_SKEPTIC_DESCRIPTION: Prioritizes verification and logic; resists superstition and propaganda, supporting knowledge-driven progress.
DATA_C_SPECULATOR_DESCRIPTION: Takes calculated risks for big profit; gains influence as economic volatility rises.
DATA_C_SPENDTHRIFT_DESCRIPTION: Increases immediate gratification and flashy spending; uplifting in abundance but vulnerable in famine.
DATA_C_SPYMASTER_DESCRIPTION: Excels at intelligence gathering and covert operations; creates asymmetric advantage in diplomacy and war.
DATA_C_STORYTELLER_DESCRIPTION: Boosts group morale via stories and performance; synergizes with festivals, legends, and religious spread events.
DATA_C_STRATEGIST_DESCRIPTION: High creativity and planning with potentially weak moral restraint; excels at long-term strategy, espionage, and politics.
DATA_C_STRATEGIST_GENERAL_DESCRIPTION: A commander combining planning and improvisation; greatly increases combat AI strategic decision quality.
DATA_C_STRICT_COMMANDER_DESCRIPTION: Maintains organization through discipline and punishment; boosts short-term combat power but seeds resentment.
DATA_C_SURVIVALIST_DESCRIPTION: Strong at risk preparation and resource management; increases survival in disasters, plagues, and famine.
DATA_C_THIEF_DESCRIPTION: Skilled at theft and infiltration; creates tension in systems with policing, locks, and surveillance.
DATA_C_TRICKSTER_DESCRIPTION: Finds loopholes and bends rules playfully; can improvise clever solutions but may undermine trust.
DATA_C_TYRANT_DESCRIPTION: High power and charisma but low empathy and fairness; rules through fear and coercion, increasing revolt risk.
DATA_C_VISIONARY_DESCRIPTION: Future-oriented and persuasive; catalyzes new paths and accelerates tech/culture development events.
DATA_C_WALLFLOWER_DESCRIPTION: Kind and empathetic but avoids the spotlight; may carry internal stress while contributing quietly through care.
DATA_C_XA_HH_SOCIAL_PEACEMAKER_DESCRIPTI: Social Peacemaker archetype based on X-A axis combination.
DATA_C_XA_HL_DOMINATING_AGITATOR_DESCRIP: Dominating Agitator archetype based on X-A axis combination.
DATA_C_XA_LH_QUIET_HELPER_DESCRIPTION: Quiet Helper archetype based on X-A axis combination.
DATA_C_XA_LL_ISOLATED_BRAWLER_DESCRIPTIO: Isolated Brawler archetype based on X-A axis combination.
DATA_C_XC_HH_COMPETENT_LEADER_DESCRIPTIO: Competent Leader archetype based on X-C axis combination.
DATA_C_XC_HL_CHARMING_IMPROVISER_DESCRIP: Charming Improviser archetype based on X-C axis combination.
DATA_C_XC_LH_SILENT_CRAFTSMAN_DESCRIPTIO: Silent Craftsman archetype based on X-C axis combination.
DATA_C_XC_LL_APATHETIC_RECLUSE_DESCRIPTI: Apathetic Recluse archetype based on X-C axis combination.
DATA_C_XO_HH_CHARISMATIC_VISIONARY_DESCR: Charismatic Visionary archetype based on X-O axis combination.
DATA_C_XO_HL_POPULIST_DESCRIPTION: Populist archetype based on X-O axis combination.
DATA_C_XO_LH_SOLITARY_SCHOLAR_DESCRIPTIO: Solitary Scholar archetype based on X-O axis combination.
DATA_C_XO_LL_WALLFLOWER_DESCRIPTION: Wallflower archetype based on X-O axis combination.
DATA_C_ZEALOT_DESCRIPTION: Binds a group through strict discipline and belief, but may suppress dissent and trigger schism or persecution.
DATA_DATA_STRESSOR_EVENTS_ROOT_ACQUAINTA: Low-intensity stress from the death of an acquaintance. Slightly amplified if they lived in the same settlement.
DATA_DATA_STRESSOR_EVENTS_ROOT_ARGUMENT_: Low-level stress from an argument. Patience and calmness traits reduce impact; stubbornness and hot temper amplify it.
DATA_DATA_STRESSOR_EVENTS_ROOT_BETRAYAL_: The discovery of betrayal by a trusted individual. Amplified significantly when the betrayer is a partner or close friend; causes lasting trust reduction.
DATA_DATA_STRESSOR_EVENTS_ROOT_BUILDING_: A minor stress relief event from completing a building. Amplified 30% for the first building completed; injects joy and anticipation.
DATA_DATA_STRESSOR_EVENTS_ROOT_CHILDBIRT: Positive stress relief for the father upon the birth of a child. Lower magnitude than the mother; amplified for the firstborn.
A positive stress event where successful childbirth instantly reduces stress. Joy, trust, and anticipation are the dominant injected emotions.
DATA_DATA_STRESSOR_EVENTS_ROOT_CHILD_DEA: The highest base instant stress event in the simulation. Impact scales with child's age at death and whether the parent witnessed it.
DATA_DATA_STRESSOR_EVENTS_ROOT_CLOSE_FRI: Loss of a close friend, scaling strongly with bond strength. Callous and psychopathic traits significantly reduce impact.
DATA_DATA_STRESSOR_EVENTS_ROOT_COMBAT_EN: Active combat engagement with the highest per-tick stress rate. Pacifist and gentle traits dramatically amplify distress; berserkers and mercenaries are nearly unaffected.
DATA_DATA_STRESSOR_EVENTS_ROOT_CONSTANT_: Chronic stress from lack of safety. Accumulates during prolonged exposure to unsafe environments.
DATA_DATA_STRESSOR_EVENTS_ROOT_DEHYDRATI: Physiological stress from dehydration. Accumulates when thirst drops below critical threshold.
DATA_DATA_STRESSOR_EVENTS_ROOT_EXILE_BAN: Being exiled from the settlement. Amplified when leaving family behind or when the exile is perceived as unjust; triggers fear, sadness, and anger.
DATA_DATA_STRESSOR_EVENTS_ROOT_FORCED_AC: Stress from being forced to perform an action by the player god. Amplified when the commanded action conflicts with personality or involves danger.
DATA_DATA_STRESSOR_EVENTS_ROOT_HYPOTHERM: Physical threat stress from body temperature drop. Occurs when warmth falls below critical in cold environments.
DATA_DATA_STRESSOR_EVENTS_ROOT_MATERNAL_: A compound trauma of losing a partner during childbirth. If the newborn also died, the stress amplification is severe.
DATA_DATA_STRESSOR_EVENTS_ROOT_OVERCROWD: Continuous low-level stress from living in an overcrowded settlement. No instant hit; low sociability and hermit traits amplify ongoing sensitivity.
DATA_DATA_STRESSOR_EVENTS_ROOT_PARENT_DE: Stress from losing a parent. Impact is dramatically higher for child-aged agents and when the deceased was the last surviving parent.
DATA_DATA_STRESSOR_EVENTS_ROOT_PARTNERSH: Dissolution of a romantic partnership. Self-initiated breakups reduce impact significantly; high dependence traits amplify the damage.
DATA_DATA_STRESSOR_EVENTS_ROOT_PARTNER_D: One of the highest-impact loss events, scaling with bond strength. Witnessing the death or sudden unexpectedness significantly amplifies the stress.
DATA_DATA_STRESSOR_EVENTS_ROOT_PREDATOR_: Encountering a predatory animal. Highly amplified for child agents and when alone; group presence significantly reduces impact.
DATA_DATA_STRESSOR_EVENTS_ROOT_REJECTION: Being excluded or rejected by a group or individual. Public or romantic rejection dramatically increases impact; low social self-esteem amplifies vulnerability.
DATA_DATA_STRESSOR_EVENTS_ROOT_SEVERE_IN: Suffering a severe physical injury. Permanent disability amplifies stress by 50%. Fear and sadness are the primary injected emotions.
DATA_DATA_STRESSOR_EVENTS_ROOT_SIBLING_D: Stress from losing a sibling, amplified if the agent is a child. Scales with bond strength.
DATA_DATA_STRESSOR_EVENTS_ROOT_STARVATIO: Experiencing extreme food shortage. Amplified when the agent has dependents or when settlement-wide famine is occurring.
DATA_DATA_STRESSOR_EVENTS_ROOT_STILLBORN: The trauma of a stillbirth. Amplified for first pregnancies; primary injected emotions are sadness and anger.
DATA_DATA_STRESSOR_EVENTS_ROOT_SUCCESSFU: A minor stress relief event from a successful hunt. Amplified 1.5x during famine conditions when food is most needed.
DATA_DATA_STRESSOR_EVENTS_ROOT_THEFT_VIC: Having possessions stolen. Dramatically amplified when food is stolen while the agent is already starving.
DATA_D_BACKSTABBER_DESCRIPTION: Social on the surface but readily betrays allies; gains short-term advantage while accelerating group collapse.
DATA_D_BULLY_DESCRIPTION: Forces compliance through threat and power; increases fear but can erode long-term loyalty and cooperation.
DATA_D_CALLOUS_DESCRIPTION: Low empathy and emotional bonding; does less caretaking and may use others coldly to reach goals.
DATA_D_CON_ARTIST_DESCRIPTION: Uses charm and planning to deceive for gain; high persuasion success but poor long-term trust.
DATA_D_CORRUPT_OFFICIAL_DESCRIPTION: Uses organization and authority for rent-seeking; keeps short-term order while institutionalizing corruption.
DATA_D_CULT_LEADER_DESCRIPTION: Binds a group through charisma and discipline while suppressing dissent and reinforcing personality cult dynamics.
DATA_D_HISTRIONIC_DESCRIPTION: Dramatic emotional expression and strong attention-seeking; can attract crowds but may disrupt stable governance.
DATA_D_MACHIAVELLIAN_DESCRIPTION: Maximizes gains via long-term planning and manipulation; orderly on the surface but treats trust as a resource.
DATA_D_NARCISSIST_GRANDIOSE_DESCRIPTION: Craves attention and praise with a sense of entitlement; reacts with anger and retaliation when ignored.
DATA_D_NARCISSIST_VULNERABLE_DESCRIPTION: Appears withdrawn yet craves validation and entitlement; high shame and anxiety can destabilize relationships.
DATA_D_OPPORTUNIST_DESCRIPTION: Puts immediate gain over rules; quickly pivots, betrays, or takes risky opportunities when they appear.
DATA_D_PREDATORY_RAIDER_DESCRIPTION: Lives through combat and raiding; leads attacks without much fear, but with high cruelty.
DATA_D_PSYCHOPATH_PRIMARY_DESCRIPTION: Low empathy and guilt, low fear. Feels little stress from rule-breaking, increasing exploitation and violence.
DATA_D_PSYCHOPATH_SECONDARY_DESCRIPTION: Impulsive, antagonistic, and emotionally volatile; more violence and betrayal with weak long-term planning.
DATA_D_SADIST_DESCRIPTION: May derive enjoyment from others' pain or use it instrumentally; increases cruelty with weak inhibitions.
DATA_F_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION: Values aesthetic quality, investing in beauty and decoration in building and crafting.
DATA_F_ANXIOUS_DESCRIPTION: Frequently anticipates what could go wrong; doubles down on checking and preparation but is vulnerable to stress.
DATA_F_APATHETIC_DESCRIPTION: Prefers the familiar and has low learning drive; adapts slowly to rapid change.
DATA_F_BOLD_DESCRIPTION: Approaches strangers and new situations proactively; increases negotiation, persuasion, and adventurous actions.
DATA_F_CALM_DESCRIPTION: Keeps composure in unexpected situations and makes steadier decisions under pressure.
DATA_F_CARELESS_DESCRIPTION: Often misses details and quality control; may be faster but makes more errors and accidents.
DATA_F_CONFIDENT_DESCRIPTION: High self-efficacy and willingness to step forward; strong in leadership and persuasion.
DATA_F_CONVENTIONAL_DESCRIPTION: Prefers proven methods and convention; strong in routine work but less likely to attempt radical innovation.
DATA_F_CORRUPT_DESCRIPTION: Feels little hesitation about bribes, embezzlement, or exploiting others if it is unlikely to be punished.
DATA_F_CREATIVE_DESCRIPTION: Generates novel solutions and improvises well in tactics and invention; heavy constraints can increase stress.
DATA_F_CURIOUS_DESCRIPTION: Seeks new information and experimentation; boosts exploration and research and supports knowledge-driven progress.
DATA_F_DECEPTIVE_DESCRIPTION: Adapts the truth to the situation and may use lying or manipulation as a tool when needed.
DATA_F_DEPENDENT_DESCRIPTION: Prefers support and reassurance over acting alone, sometimes clinging strongly to close bonds.
DATA_F_DISORGANIZED_DESCRIPTION: Weak at prioritizing and organization; improvises under pressure but makes more mistakes.
DATA_F_ENERGETIC_DESCRIPTION: High energy and quick to act; increases speed but may raise mistakes due to rushing.
DATA_F_FAIR_MINDED_DESCRIPTION: Tries to keep rules and promises, strongly disliking cheating or unfair privilege.
DATA_F_FEARFUL_DESCRIPTION: Quickly detects danger and tends to avoid it, often choosing retreat when odds look bad.
DATA_F_FEARLESS_DESCRIPTION: Less sensitive to threat and acts boldly, rarely hesitating to explore danger or charge in.
DATA_F_FLEXIBLE_DESCRIPTION: Reduces conflict through compromise; increases negotiation and diplomacy, lowering group friction.
DATA_F_FORGIVING_DESCRIPTION: Doesn't hold grudges long and tries to repair relationships, reducing conflict and stabilizing groups.
DATA_F_FRUGAL_DESCRIPTION: Values practicality over luxury, conserving resources and avoiding showy spending.
DATA_F_GENTLE_DESCRIPTION: Treats others gently rather than forcefully; reduces violent and intimidating behaviors.
DATA_F_GREEDY_DESCRIPTION: Craves more reward and resources, easily feeling resentment or envy in loss or sharing situations.
DATA_F_GREGARIOUS_DESCRIPTION: Gains energy from social interaction; builds relationships quickly and boosts group cohesion.
DATA_F_HARSH_DESCRIPTION: Uses intimidation and dominance; may gain short-term compliance but often loses trust.
DATA_F_HOT_TEMPERED_DESCRIPTION: Anger spikes quickly and can turn behavior harsh; increases charging in combat but hurts teamwork and quality.
DATA_F_INDUSTRIOUS_DESCRIPTION: Works steadily without procrastinating; increases output but may recover stress more slowly due to overwork.
DATA_F_INSECURE_DESCRIPTION: Avoids the spotlight and is sensitive to rejection or criticism, increasing stress.
DATA_F_LAZY_DESCRIPTION: Feels effort as costly and tends to procrastinate; may have less short-term stress but lower productivity and reliability.
DATA_F_MODEST_DESCRIPTION: Shares credit rather than boasting, and works without needing constant recognition.
DATA_F_NONCONFORMIST_DESCRIPTION: Prefers experimenting over sticking to norms; can spark innovation but may clash with institutions.
DATA_F_ORGANIZED_DESCRIPTION: Plans and organizes systematically, boosting productivity while reducing errors and chaos stress.
DATA_F_PATIENT_DESCRIPTION: Tolerates frustration well and rarely explodes; strong in long projects and negotiations.
DATA_F_PERFECTIONIST_DESCRIPTION: Raises standards and quality significantly, but slows work and can increase frustration and stress.
DATA_F_PRUDENT_DESCRIPTION: Prioritizes planning over impulse; manages risk and reduces accidents, but may be slow when improvisation is needed.
DATA_F_RECKLESS_DESCRIPTION: Acts impulsively and underestimates risk; increases adventure and charges but raises accidents and large losses.
DATA_F_RESERVED_DESCRIPTION: Moves quietly with muted expression; slower pace but fewer mistakes and less overheating.
DATA_F_SELF_IMPORTANT_DESCRIPTION: Expects special respect and reacts strongly to being ignored or disrespected.
DATA_F_SELF_RELIANT_DESCRIPTION: Strongly prefers solving problems alone and relies less on others even during crises.
DATA_F_SENTIMENTAL_DESCRIPTION: Warm and empathetic; reacts strongly to others' suffering and often chooses caring actions.
DATA_F_SHY_DESCRIPTION: Dislikes speaking up or being the center of attention; tends to gravitate toward solo tasks.
DATA_F_SINCERE_DESCRIPTION: Prefers telling the truth as-is and feels strong aversion to deception or backroom deals.
DATA_F_SOLITARY_DESCRIPTION: Feels comfortable alone and tires in crowds; strong at solo work like research or crafting.
DATA_F_STUBBORN_DESCRIPTION: Hard to sway once decided; can stand firm under pressure but may increase conflict by refusing compromise.
DATA_F_TOUGH_MINDED_DESCRIPTION: Less emotionally shaken and more cool-headed; tends to do less comforting or caretaking.
DATA_F_TRADITIONALIST_DESCRIPTION: Values tradition and norms; supports stability but may adapt slowly to rapid change.
DATA_F_UTILITARIAN_DESCRIPTION: Prefers efficiency over decoration; makes fast, rational choices but has little interest in creative luxury.
DATA_F_VENGEFUL_DESCRIPTION: Remembers slights and seeks payback; increases conflict, sometimes using intimidation to reduce fear.
